Package com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXAutoLink
    This interface is extended by IXIntegratorAutoLink and IXHarnessXCAutoLink Implement IXIntegratorAutoLink if customized auto link functionality is required in the Integrator Change Manager.
    IXBridgeContext
    Interface for accessing the bridges adaptor reporter and the import source file through a context.
    IXBridgeExportPostProcessor
    This plugin is used to process adaptor data while doing Bridge Out.
    IXBridgeImportPreProcessor
    This plugin is used to process adaptor data while doing Bridge In.
    IXBridgePrePostProcessor
    This plugin is used to process adaptor data while doing Bridge In or Bridge Out.
    IXBridgeProcessor
    This plugin is used to additionally process data while doing bridgeIn or bridgeOut.
    IXFunctionBridgeProcessor
    Implement this Bridge Processor plugin interface to process functional design data during Bridge In or Bridge Out.
    IXHarnessBridgeProcessor
    Implement this if bridge in process is required is required in Harness XC.
    IXHarnessXCAutoLink
    Implement this if customized auto link functionality is required in the Harness XC Change Manager.
    IXIntegratorAutoLink
    Implement this if customized auto link functionality is required in the Integrator Change Manager.
    IXIntegratorBridgeProcessor
    Implement this if bridge in process is required is required in Integrator.
    IXLogicBridgeProcessor
    Implement this if bridge processing is required in Logic Bridges.
    IXTopologyAutoLink
    Implement this if customized auto link functionality is required in the Topology Design Change Manager.
    IXTopologyBridgeProcessor
    Implement this if bridge in process is required in a topology design.
